description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Transfer exactly $250 from your primary checking account to the savings account with the highest interest rate, scheduling the transfer for today.
tasks.name: Transfer exactly $250 from your primary checking account to the savings account with the highest interest rate, scheduling the transfer for today.
tasks.description: Transfer exactly $250 from your primary checking account to the savings account with the highest interest rate, scheduling the transfer for today.

tasks.instruction: Find the smallest upcoming utility bill and schedule a full payment from your everyday checking account exactly 2 days before its due date.
tasks.name: Find the smallest upcoming utility bill and schedule a full payment from your everyday checking account exactly 2 days before its due date.
tasks.description: Find the smallest upcoming utility bill and schedule a full payment from your everyday checking account exactly 2 days before its due date.

tasks.instruction: Create a $300 monthly budget for restaurant and dining expenses and add an alert that triggers when 90% of the budget is used.
tasks.name: Create a $300 monthly budget for restaurant and dining expenses and add an alert that triggers when 90% of the budget is used.
tasks.description: Create a $300 monthly budget for restaurant and dining expenses and add an alert that triggers when 90% of the budget is used.

tasks.instruction: In your primary checking account’s last 30 days of activity, find all uncategorized transactions over $50 and change the category of at least the first three to Groceries.
tasks.name: In your primary checking account’s last 30 days of activity, find all uncategorized transactions over $50 and change the category of at least the first three to Groceries.
tasks.description: In your primary checking account’s last 30 days of activity, find all uncategorized transactions over $50 and change the category of at least the first three to Groceries.

tasks.instruction: Create an emergency fund savings goal with a $2,000 target to be reached by the end of June last year, linking it to the savings account with the highest interest rate and setting up automatic weekly $75 contributions every Friday from your primary checking account.
tasks.name: Create an emergency fund savings goal with a $2,000 target to be reached by the end of June last year, linking it to the savings account with the highest interest rate and setting up automatic weekly $75 contributions every Friday from your primary checking account.
tasks.description: Create an emergency fund savings goal with a $2,000 target to be reached by the end of June last year, linking it to the savings account with the highest interest rate and setting up automatic weekly $75 contributions every Friday from your primary checking account.

tasks.instruction: From the available credit cards, choose a no-annual-fee option that offers at least 3% cashback on groceries and has an APR under 20%, then among those select the one with the lowest APR and start an application by entering your full name and an annual income of 55,000.
tasks.name: From the available credit cards, choose a no-annual-fee option that offers at least 3% cashback on groceries and has an APR under 20%, then among those select the one with the lowest APR and start an application by entering your full name and an annual income of 55,000.
tasks.description: From the available credit cards, choose a no-annual-fee option that offers at least 3% cashback on groceries and has an APR under 20%, then among those select the one with the lowest APR and start an application by entering your full name and an annual income of 55,000.

tasks.instruction: Set up two in-app alerts: one that triggers when your primary checking account balance falls below $500, and another that triggers when any transaction over $200 occurs on any of your accounts.
tasks.name: Set up two in-app alerts: one that triggers when your primary checking account balance falls below $500, and another that triggers when any transaction over $200 occurs on any of your accounts.
tasks.description: Set up two in-app alerts: one that triggers when your primary checking account balance falls below $500, and another that triggers when any transaction over $200 occurs on any of your accounts.

tasks.instruction: For your primary checking account, locate the statement for the first month of last year, download it as a PDF, and mark that statement as a favorite.
tasks.name: For your primary checking account, locate the statement for the first month of last year, download it as a PDF, and mark that statement as a favorite.
tasks.description: For your primary checking account, locate the statement for the first month of last year, download it as a PDF, and mark that statement as a favorite.

tasks.instruction: Select your default debit card, lock it, and request a replacement marked as a lost card with expedited (2–3 business days) delivery to your default mailing address.
